text.title: browser-automation-overview Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for browser-automation-overview as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent adds await page.waitForTimeout(2000) after every interaction to "let the page settle".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Fixed sleeps are fragile and slow; they fail when pages take longer than 2s and waste time when pages settle in 50ms. Use event-driven waits instead.
